app.name: Interactive Audiobook-Assistant
app.tagline: Multilingual AI reader with precise citations

auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the magic link.

upload.prompt: Drop a PDF, image, or text file (≤ 50 MB) — or click to choose one.
upload.maxSize: Up to 50 MB. PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, plain text.

documents.heading: Your documents
documents.empty: No documents yet — upload one to get started.

viewer.heading: Source
viewer.noDocument: Pick a document to preview it here.
viewer.notReady: Document is {{status}}. The viewer opens once it is ready.
viewer.textComingSoon: Plain-text viewer arrives in a later release.

chat.heading: Ask questions
chat.pickDocument: Pick a ready document to start chatting.
chat.notReady: This document is {{status}}. Wait until it's ready to ask questions.
chat.empty: Ask anything about this document — every answer cites the exact passage.
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about this document
chat.jumpToPage: Jump to page {{page}} and highlight passage

account.exportFailed: Export failed ({{status}}). Try again or contact support.
account.deleteConfirm: This will erase your account and all data. This cannot be undone. Continue?
account.deleteDone: Account deleted. You're being signed out.
account.deleteFailed: Delete failed ({{status}}). Some data may remain. Email support.

consent.message: We collect anonymous usage events to improve ARIA. No personal data, no third-party ads. Your call.

audio.keyboardHint: Space play/pause · ←/→ seek 5s · ↑/↓ volume · M mute · 0 restart
audio.unsupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.
